---
title: "v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.version-page}
::: {.version-hero}
<span class="version-label">v9c / DiT hybrid</span>

# v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen

This version combines the v8 DiT backbone with the strongest v4 fine-tuning ideas: condition dropout for CFG and
re-coarsening consistency.
:::

::: {.version-layout}
::: {.version-main}
## Hypothesis

The training objective combines FM with coarse consistency:

$$
\mathcal{L}=\mathcal{L}_{FM}+\lambda_c\left\|C(\widehat{\mathbf{x}}_{HR})-\mathbf{x}_{LR}\right\|_2^2.
$$

Condition dropout also makes the model CFG-ready at inference.

{{< include _variable-results.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.version-side}
## Parameters

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Backbone | pixel DiT |
| Objective | residual FM |
| Condition dropout | `0.15` |
| Re-coarsening weight | `0.05` |
| Embed dim | `384` |
| Heads | `12` |

## References

- [DiT](../methods/dit.html)
- [CFG](../methods/cfg.html)
- [Re-coarsening](../methods/recoarsening.html)
:::
:::
:::
